name: documents_v2
notes: Primary read table for the workspace: GET /api/documents and GET /api/search both query documents_v2 ordered by uploaded_at DESC.

Tags are stored as a PostgreSQL TEXT[] array and updated directly by PUT /api/documents/:id/tags (max 10 tags enforced by backend); the insert path (via trigger) always sets tags to NULL — tags must be added after upload.

Rows are populated by the trigger trg_sync_to_v2 when a new row is inserted into the 'documents' table by POST /api/upload; the trigger deliberately omits the tags column (FR-008 — tags lost on upload).

name: documents
notes: Write-only from the frontend's perspective: POST /api/upload inserts into 'documents'; neither the document list nor the search endpoint reads from this table (they both read documents_v2).

The trigger trg_sync_to_v2 fires AFTER INSERT and propagates the row to documents_v2, but the INSERT statement in the trigger function omits the tags column — meaning tags uploaded with the file are silently dropped.
